Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_DVCPROHD1080i50

A type that identifies the Panasonic DVCPro-HD 1080i50 format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_DVCPROHD1080i50: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
